Interface IWin32Shape2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to members that prepare a set of GDI drawing instructions for a geometry.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("AB5EB1E9-90CC-11D4-9F6A-00C04F6BDF0D")]
public interface IWin32Shape2 : IWin32Shape

displayExtent IEnvelope
byteCount int
byteBuffer IntPtr

dice bool
